summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 3 new features (Compare Mode, Export PNG/JSON, CSV Calibration) completed. All features working correctly. 100% pass rate.

minor_warnings.issue: React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> - development build only, doesn't affect functionality
CORS warning when accessing Google Fonts CSS rules - known html-to-image library limitation, PNG still exports correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features tested and working: (1) Compare Mode with up to 4 plans, IGNITE ALL, comparison table ranked by EV with winner highlighting, (2) Export PNG/JSON for single run and compare results, (3) CSV Calibration modal with sample generation, column detection, stats display, and strategy application. Core flow regression test also passed.

passed: Regression: Core flow works - pick firm → pick plan → IGNITE → results render with 8 KPIs + 3 charts + stats row
ADD TO COMPARE button (data-testid='btn-add-compare') - adds current planDraft to compare rack, counter shows '(N/4)', disabled when N=4
Compare rack (data-testid='compare-rack') appears when slots.length >= 1, shows SLOT-01..SLOT-04 cards with plan info (cap/target/dd), × removes slot, ↺ clear wipes all
IGNITE ALL button (data-testid='btn-run-all') - disabled if slots.length < 2, runs MC for every slot, updates slot cards with p(pass) and ev, renders comparison table

Comparison table (data-testid='compare-results') - rows ranked by EV descending, winner per metric highlighted in ember with text-shadow glow, rank col shows ★ for #1 and #N for others, columns: P·PASS, EV/ATTEMPT, AVG COST, MEAN DAYS, P90 DAYS, BANKROLL 95%, ROI/PASS
Comparison banner at bottom - '★ WINNER · {plan} · highest EV at +$X/attempt · p(pass) Y%'
Export PNG single (data-testid='btn-export-png') - clicking triggers download (CORS warning expected but PNG exports)
Export JSON single (data-testid='btn-export-json') - clicking triggers JSON download, no console errors
Export PNG compare (data-testid='btn-compare-png') and JSON (data-testid='btn-compare-json') - trigger downloads for compare view

CSV Modal - click 'calibrate from CSV' (data-testid='btn-open-csv') opens modal (data-testid='csv-modal'). Click [data-testid='btn-csv-sample'] generates 90 rows. Modal auto-picks the pnl column (the one with negatives). Detected stats section shows samples/wins/losses/total/avg. Calibrated strategy section shows win rate/μ win/σ win/μ loss/σ loss/p(spike)/spike mult
CSV apply (data-testid='btn-csv-apply') - clicking closes modal and updates the strategy panel values (strat-wr, strat-muwin, strat-sigmawin, strat-muloss, strat-sigmaloss reflect calibrated values)
CSV textarea (data-testid='csv-textarea') - accepts manual paste, re-parses on change
CSV file upload (data-testid='csv-file-input') - hidden file input exists, wrapped in label, accepts .csv
CSV skip header toggle (data-testid='csv-skip-header') - visible and functional
CSV column selector (data-testid='csv-col-select') - allows switching between detected columns
CSV error case - if column has no negatives/no losing days, shows red error '// No losing days found.' Never crashes
No critical console errors during full compare-mode + csv-calibration flow
No dark-on-dark invisible text - all text readable against dark backgrounds

compare_mode.details: Add up to 4 plans, IGNITE ALL runs MC for all, comparison table shows rankings by EV with winner highlighting

export_functionality.details: PNG and JSON export work for both single run and compare results. PNG has expected CORS warning for Google Fonts but still exports.

csv_calibration.details: Modal opens, sample generates 90 rows, auto-detects pnl column, shows detected stats and calibrated strategy, apply updates strategy values
